props.ChoiceText: Camp followers, hangers-on, and the half-hungry taught you that an army can feed you and ruin you at once.
props.ChoiceBio: Sleeping among soldiers taught you the shape of military hunger before you ever wore a uniform.

0.TransitionText: Because sleeping among soldiers taught you the shape of military hunger before you ever wore a uniform, poverty forced another harsh turn in your life.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Mercenary, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because sleeping among soldiers taught you the shape of military hunger before you ever wore a uniform, sooner or later you found yourself pulled into common service.
